description: A citizen calls to report that a fire hydrant is open and gushing water.

nodes.task_description: Get the precise location of the open hydrant.
Ask if there is any fire department activity nearby to determine if the use is authorized.

expected_outcome.expected: Caller reports no fire department activity.

nodes.task_description: Create a high-priority service order for a water crew to go and shut off the hydrant.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent dispatches a crew to address the water waste.
